faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Institute of Pharmacy, Nashik for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Institute of Pharmacy, Nashik has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.
M.Pharma Candidate must have passed graduation from recognized university.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics OR Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognized institute/board are eligible to apply

reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with college as there is no campus placement. Although, infrastructure is new.

review_content.Placements: Placement in our college are very good. There are different types of companies such as Mahindra, Infosys, Sanjeev Industries, etc. visit for recruitment. In my opinion, from 6th semester students are eligible for placement. The highest salary package offered is 50 LPA, and which is outside of India.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus has new infrastructure, and all instruments, like the DT Disso Fertility, are in working condition. Wi-Fi is available on campus but only for teachers and students who have no Wi-Fi access. There is also a mobile network issue on campus, it is recommended to use BSNL or Airtel SIM cards, as they only work here.

reviews_list.review_title: It is good for distance learning.

review_content.Placements: Likely 50 per cent were placed. So packages are likely starting 2-3.5 LPA. So Mankind, Cipla and some relevant brands. Internships are available, and also a stipend of 9-12k per month. Associate, Drug approver, etc. And certain roles, like the junior associate role, are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, but other must-have services like the lab, library and classrooms are very good and hygienic. Hostel options are available and everything is up to expectation. But sports and other activities are limited, so keep in mind. The campus is huge enough.

In my opinion, from 6th semester students are eligible for placement. The highest salary package offered is 50 LPA, and which is outside of India.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has new infrastructure, and all instruments, like the DT Disso Fertility, are in working condition. Wi-Fi is available on campus but only for teachers and students who have no Wi-Fi access. There is also a mobile network issue on campus, it is recommended to use BSNL or Airtel SIM cards, as they only work here.

individual_reviews.title: It is good for distance learning.

content.Placements: Likely 50 per cent were placed. So packages are likely starting 2-3.5 LPA. So Mankind, Cipla and some relevant brands. Internships are available, and also a stipend of 9-12k per month. Associate, Drug approver, etc. And certain roles, like the junior associate role, are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, but other must-have services like the lab, library and classrooms are very good and hygienic. Hostel options are available and everything is up to expectation. But sports and other activities are limited, so keep in mind. The campus is huge enough.

admission_process.title: Samalkha Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Samalkha Group of Institutions offers various courses like BTech, BTech LEET, PGDM, MBA, and BBA. Eligible candidates can benefit from highly experienced faculty delivering education in various fields, including Aeronautical, Automobile, Electronics, Mechanical, Computer Science, Civil, and Structural Engineering. SGI's full-time mode ensures students acquire comprehensive knowledge and skills in their chosen disciplines.

For Samalkha Group of Institutions admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Samalkha Group of Institutions course admissions 2025:

Samalkha Group of Institutions admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around SGI admissions 2025:
Step 1: Samalkha Group of Institutions Application Process 2025

The admission process at Samalkha Group of Institutions for the academic year 2025 begins with the application process. Prospective candidates are required to download the application form from the official website of the institution. Upon completion, the filled application form needs to be submitted either via post or in person to the designated department at SGI. Additionally, candidates must pay the application and entrance test fees online and attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan to the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Admission to the various UG and PG courses offered at Samalkha Group of Institutions is based on a combination of merit and entrance tests. The selection criteria vary depending on the course:
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

Following the completion of the selection rounds, qualified candidates will be called for counselling sessions specific to their respective courses. Subsequently, SGI will release merit lists in multiple rounds, featuring the names of selected candidates. Students whose names appear on the merit list must pay the required fees to secure their seats in the desired course.

headings.text: Samalkha Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

lists: For MBA/PGDM: Candidates must hold a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks (47.75% for SC/ST candidates). Selection is based on scores obtained in MAT, XAT, or CAT.
For BE/BTech: Applicants should have passed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate marks (42.75% for SC/ST candidates). Selection is based on performance in JEE Main or HSTES entrance exams.
For BBA: Candidates must have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 40% aggregate marks. Selection is merit-based.
For BCA: Eligibility criteria include passing Class 12 exams. Admission is merit-based.
For ME/MTech: Candidates need a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks (47.75% for SC/ST candidates). Selection criteria are not specified.

review_content.Placements: A minimum of 80% is required for placement in our course. There are 7–10 lac packages offered. There are top pharmaceutical companies in which we got jobs. The pharmacist works as a hospital pharmacist and can open their own retail or wholesale store in their area .
review_content.Infrastructure: There are the best facilities for the students; there is a computer class room and Wi-Fi available in the library, and all the books related to our course are available in the library. The classrooms are neat and clean and they have good seating arrangements.

reviews_list.review_title: It would be good if they provide better placements and internship facilities.

review_content.Placements: Students with first-class grades generally get the placement. Packages vary from 2 lacs to 5–6 lacs. There is no placement for D.Pharma students but here is for Pharmacy students. Companies like Lupin, Sun Pharma, etc. come often. The roles that are offered after pharmacy are medical representative and hospital pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was fully filled with every required book, enough for every student. Classrooms are huge with proper furniture so the infrastructure of the college is good with proper labs. Wi-Fi is present throughout the college. There is no hostel facility or food facility in this college.

content.Placements: A minimum of 80% is required for placement in our course. There are 7–10 lac packages offered. There are top pharmaceutical companies in which we got jobs. The pharmacist works as a hospital pharmacist and can open their own retail or wholesale store in their area .
content.Infrastructure: There are the best facilities for the students; there is a computer class room and Wi-Fi available in the library, and all the books related to our course are available in the library. The classrooms are neat and clean and they have good seating arrangements.

individual_reviews.title: It would be good if they provide better placements and internship facilities.

content.Placements: Students with first-class grades generally get the placement. Packages vary from 2 lacs to 5–6 lacs. There is no placement for D.Pharma students but here is for Pharmacy students. content.Infrastructure: The library was fully filled with every required book, enough for every student. There is no hostel facility or food facility in this college.
